story:

Question:
Sabra found a pantry in the bank. The label on the pantry says coat. Sabra couldn’t see what was inside the pantry. Sabra opened the pantry and found a mitten. There is no coat in the pantry. Sabra closed the pantry and put it back. Meira entered the bank and saw the pantry. What was supposed to be in the pantry?
A. mitten
B. coat

The story is about Person A found a container. The label on the container says item X, but there’s no item X in the
container. Person A opened the container and found item Y. Later, Person B entered the room and saw the container.

[Candidate Answers]
A. vest
B. plate

[Question]

[Instruction]

Person A is Neila. Person B is Juanita. The container is a bag. Item X is plate. Item Y is vest.
So, the answer is [B]
